subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Bankry (fintech) is looking for a mid Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2023-01-19
• Duration: TBD
• Location: Malmö (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 800 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• GCP
• Docker Compose
• MongoDB

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Sofia Larsson
Tech Recruiter
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 73 789 01 23
